message:
feat(robot): add label intelligence, correlation audit, file intel, and schema validation

Implements four beads of robot surface parity work:

- bd-33w.2.3: Label intelligence (--robot-label-health, --robot-label-flow,
  --robot-label-attention) with per-label health scoring, cross-label flow
  analysis, and attention ranking
- bd-33w.5.1: Correlation audit loop (--robot-explain-correlation,
  --robot-confirm-correlation, --robot-reject-correlation,
  --robot-correlation-stats) with JSONL-backed FeedbackStore persistence
- bd-33w.5.2: File intelligence (--robot-orphans, --robot-file-beads,
  --robot-file-hotspots) with orphan commit detection, file-to-bead mapping,
  and hotspot ranking
- bd-33w.6.3: Strict JSON comparator and schema-validation test utilities
  (tests/test_utils + tests/schema_validation.rs) covering all robot output
  envelopes, determinism, and comparator self-tests

133 lib tests + 31 integration tests all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
